name: Delta SkyMiles® Platinum Business American Express Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn 70,000 Bonus Miles after spending $6,000 in purchases on your new Card in your first 6 months of Card Membership.
notes: Official Amex business search result shows current Platinum Business offer: 70,000 Bonus Miles after $6,000/6 months.
Previous 7/15/2026 public limited-time offer was removed from current production values to avoid displaying an expired offer.

earning_rates.notes: On purchases made directly with hotels
On eligible transit purchases; miles caps apply
On eligible U.S. shipping purchases; miles caps apply

earning_rates.category: Single eligible purchases of $5,000 or more

other_benefits: First checked bag free on Delta flights
Second checked bag free on domestic Delta-operated flights
Companion Certificate can be redeemed toward the eligible flight portion of a Delta Vacations package

sources.notes: Delta News Hub official announcement: limited-time welcome offers and 2026 benefit updates

recurring_credits.name: Resy Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $10/month statement credit on eligible U.S. Resy purchases. Enrollment required.

recurring_credits.name: Rideshare Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $10/month statement credit on U.S. rideshare purchases (select providers). Enrollment required.

recurring_credits.name: Delta Stays Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $150 annual statement credit on prepaid Delta Stays bookings on delta.com.

recurring_credits.name: Global Entry Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $100 statement credit for Global Entry application fee, every 4 years.
